The '''Manaan Docking Bay''' was a spaceport facility located in [[Ahto City]] on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]. The redeemed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] landed the [[Ebon Hawk]] in one of its hangars in the hopes of finding a [[Star Map]] there.

Beyond the docking bay was [[Ahto City]] West Central. Another hangar was occupied by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], containing a shuttle to the [[Sith Embassy]], although it is unknown whether or not Revan broke into the Embassy via that shuttle. [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] merchants who traded with offworlders also set up shop there. Revan donated a load of [[Gizka/Legends|gizka]] he accidentally received to one of these merchants named [[Nubassa]].

==Behind the scenes==
If Revan chooses the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], then he [[Death/Legends|kills]] [[Ithorak Guldar]] for [[GenoHaradan]] leader [[Hulas]] inside one of the [[Hangar/Legends|hangars]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
